name: Phloem Transport Process
description: Phloem Transport Process in Plants. This process represents a higher-level biological mechanism distinct from molecular/biochemical processes covered in GLMP.
mermaid:
graph TD
    A44[Source Tissue] --> B44[Sugar Loading]
    B44 --> C44[Sieve Elements]
    C44 --> D44[Pressure Flow]
    D44 --> E44[Bulk Flow]
    E44 --> F44[Sink Tissue]
    F44 --> G44[Sugar Unloading]
    G44 --> H44[Utilization/Storage]
    
    style A44 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style F44 fill:#ff6b6b,color:#fff
    style B44 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style C44 fill:#ffd43b,color:#000
    style D44 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style E44 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style G44 fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    style H44 fill:#b197fc,color:#fff

sources.title: Programming Framework: A Universal Process Visualization Methodology
sources.notes: Higher-level biological process visualization: Phloem Transport Process. Created using the Programming Framework methodology for organismal and ecological process analysis.

sources.title: Phloem Transport: New Insights and Controversies
Phloem loading and unloading mechanisms and their significance in plant development and agriculture
sources.authors: Lalonde S, Wipf D, Frommer WB.

notes: Higher-level biological process. GLMP covers biochemical/molecular processes; this database covers organismal/ecological processes.
